response.justification: Bogdan is an exceptionally strong candidate with over 15 years of software engineering experience, deeply matching the core stack of TypeScript, Node.js, and React. He possesses rare and specific experience with AI agent infrastructure (MCP), cloud deployments (AWS, Kubernetes), and a profound background in testing methodologies (TDD, test framework authoring), making him an outstanding fit for this Senior Fullstack role.
strengths: Extensive experience with the primary stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React) and cloud/containerization (AWS, Kubernetes, Docker).
Directly relevant, niche experience in AI-agent infrastructure and Model Context Protocol (MCP) workflows.
Exceptional testing and quality assurance background, including building custom test runners and teaching TDD.
concerns: Nest.js and Vitest are not explicitly mentioned, though his deep Node/TS and testing expertise easily bridges this gap.
Has held 'Staff' titles and founded an open-source platform, which might make a 'Mid-Senior' individual contributor role feel like a step down.
Resume contains a chronological typo (current role starting in 'April 2025') which requires minor clarification.
